name: Submit to antiSMASH
description: Submits a DNA sequence or GenBank file to the public antiSMASH API for PKS domain analysis. Provide either seq (raw DNA string) or filepath (path to a .gb file from reverse_translate). Active Site Finder and KnownClusterBlast are always enabled.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: Raw DNA sequence string to analyze (minimum 1000 bp). Prodigal is used for gene prediction. Provide either seq or filepath, not both.

inputs.name: filepath
inputs.description: Path to a GenBank (.gb) file to upload directly (e.g. from reverse_translate's file_saved_at field). Preferred over seq — uses CDS annotations directly, skipping Prodigal for more accurate domain calls.

outputs.description: A message containing the antiSMASH job ID to be passed to check_antismash.

output.result: Job successfully submitted! The Job ID is: bacteria-xxxxxxxx-...
Job successfully submitted! The Job ID is: bacteria-xxxxxxxx-...
